sections.paragraph: (“camp,” see מַחֲנֶה pl. letter c, according to Gen 32:3, camps or bands of angels), [Mahanaim], pr.n. of a town beyond Jordan, situated on the borders of Gad and Manasseh, afterwards a Levitical town, Jos 13:26, 30 Jos 13:30 21:38 2Sa 2:8, 12 2Sa 2:12, 29 2Sa 2:29 17:24 , 27 2Sa 17:27 1Ki 2:8 4:14 .
